notes: Thorough integrated audit with a durable report, focused lifecycle repair and regression coverage, clean-suite/install validation, and explicit attribution/PR-scope review. Known non-Luca failures and the wrapper-heartbeat orphan were transparently documented and handed off as focused follow-ups rather than concealed. Decomposition was appropriate for a single-main integration audit; follow-up tasks have clear ownership. Minor deductions for the brief accidental project-graph mutation/cleanup and for unresolved platform-wide smoke/orphan findings that prevent an unconditional all-green conclusion.
